entity.summary: Decentralized exchange launched on Avalanche under the Trader Joe brand and later renamed LFJ. The protocol expanded beyond its original chain and operates a multichain DEX and trading platform centered on Liquidity Book infrastructure.
entity.notes: Launch date is month-level for the original Trader Joe DEX. LFJ is modeled as the continuing identity of the same protocol rather than a separate successor entity.

events.title: Trader Joe DEX launched on Avalanche
events.description: The exchange began operation on Avalanche under the Trader Joe brand and developed into a major liquidity and swap venue in the ecosystem.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker; no exact day is asserted.

events.title: Trader Joe adopted the LFJ brand
events.description: The continuing Trader Joe protocol identity adopted the LFJ name while retaining the JOE token, Liquidity Book technology and multichain exchange operation.
events.notes: Month-level rebrand marker. Modeled as an in-place brand change, not a terminal rebranded entity status.

evidence.title: Trader Joe archived official domain
evidence.notes: Historical domain evidence for the original Trader Joe brand.

evidence.title: Trader Joe protocol profile
evidence.notes: Independent protocol-directory corroboration for the original exchange identity.

evidence.title: LFJ official website
evidence.notes: Current official application confirming active operation under the LFJ brand.

evidence.title: Welcome to LFJ
evidence.notes: Current official documentation defining LFJ as the DEX and trading platform powered by Liquidity Book.

evidence.title: LFJ brand and ecosystem information
evidence.notes: Official brand documentation used to connect the Trader Joe and LFJ identities.
